summary: Verified all commission structure updates, withdrawal fee changes, Stripe Connect, and page creation fee changes. All 10 backend API tests passed. UI verification confirmed correct tier-based commission rates display and withdrawal section with 3% fee.
critical_code_review_comments: All commission rates correctly configured in subscription_tiers.py
WITHDRAWAL_FEE_RATE = 0.03 (3%) correctly set in referral_system.py and stripe_payments.py
Page creation fee of -2000 BL correctly set in bl_rewards.py and referral_system.py
Diamond tier replaces Platinum at $29.99 with 4%/3% commission rates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major commission and withdrawal updates verified. Commission structure: Free (2%/1%), Bronze/Silver/Gold (3%/2%), Diamond (4%/3%). Withdrawal fee is 3% with $10 minimum. Page creation costs 2,000 BL. Stripe Connect endpoints functional.

commission_structure_frontend.my_team_page: Commission Structure table shows Free (2%/1%), Bronze/Silver/Gold (3%/2%), Diamond (4%/3%)

withdrawal_system.wallet_page: Withdraw Earnings section with Stripe Connect button

page_creation_fee.pages_page: Create Page modal shows '2,000 BL Coins Fee'

verified_features.platinum_removal: Platinum tier correctly NOT present (replaced by Diamond)
